message:
feat(core,fts5,pager,wal): connection expansion, FTS5 improvements, pager refinements, parallel WAL enhancements

Connection (+345 lines):
- Major connection expansion with additional prepared statement paths,
  schema refresh improvements, and transaction handling refinements

FTS5 (+150 lines):
- Expand FTS5 full-text search extension with improved tokenizer
  handling and query processing

Pager:
- Minor pager refinements for split-lock commit coordination

Parallel WAL (+88 lines):
- Expand parallel WAL writer with additional frame coordination and
  commit batching improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
